subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who was named Moses and give him glad tidings of this momentous News. O Moses! Hearken unto the Call from the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من سمی بموسی و نبشره بهذا النبا العظیم یا موسی اسمع الندآء من السدره
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @idolatry, @suffering and imprisonment, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
